benchmark_cmd:
benchmark_serving.py --model /SFS-aGqda6ct/models/DeepSeek-R1-0528-NVFP4-v2 --port 8888 --backend openai --input-len 1024 --output-len 1024 --random-range-ratio 0.8 --num-prompts 40 --max-concurrency 4 --num-warmups 8 --result-filename result_fp4_throughput_chat_ep8_c4 --result-dir ./results/b200_dsr_fp4/b200_dsr_fp4_mtp0_ep8_tp8_post2 --metadata max_model_len=8192 kv_cache_dtype=fp8 kv_cache_free_mem_fraction=0.8 tensor_parallel_size=8 gpu_count=8 ep_size=8 dp_attention=false moe_backend=TRTLLM mtp_layers=0 piecewise_cuda_graphs=true random_range_ratio=0.8 trtllm_version=[TensorRT-LLM] TensorRT LLM version: 1.2.0rc6.post2
1.2.0rc6.post2 container_image=nvcr.io/nvidia/tensorrt-llm/release:1.2.0rc6.post2
config_yaml:
cuda_graph_config:
    enable_padding: true
    max_batch_size: 4
enable_attention_dp: false
print_iter_log: true
kv_cache_config:
    dtype: fp8
    free_gpu_memory_fraction: 0.8
    enable_block_reuse: false
stream_interval: 10
moe_config:
    backend: TRTLLM
torch_compile_config:
    capture_num_tokens: [1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32, 64, 128, 256, 512, 768, 1024, 1280, 1536, 1792, 2048, 2304, 2560, 2816, 3072, 3328, 3584, 3840, 4096, 4352, 4608, 4864, 5120, 5376, 5632, 5888, 6144, 6400, 6656, 6912, 7168, 7424, 7680, 7936, 8192]
    enable_piecewise_cuda_graph: true
